mapper.sql:
FROM ( SELECT @rownum:=@rownum+1 as COUNT , AA.* FROM( SELECT GM_KEYNO , CASE GM_DIVISION WHEN 'C' THEN '일반' WHEN 'S' THEN '특별' END AS GM_DIVISION , GM_NAME , GM_DATE , U.UI_NAME , P.PM_NAME , CASE GM_USE WHEN 'N' THEN '사용안함' WHEN 'Y' THEN '사용함' END AS GM_USE , LEFT(GM_REGDT,19) GM_REGDT FROM t_group_manager GM LEFT JOIN u_userinfo U ON GM.GM_REGNM = U.UI_KEYNO LEFT JOIN t_place_manager P ON P.PM_KEYNO = GM.GM_PLACE WHERE PM_USE = 'Y' AND GM_DELYN = 'N' AND GM.GM_USE != 'D'
AND GM_MN_HOMEDIV_C = #{GM_MN_HOMEDIV_C}
ORDER BY GM.GM_REGDT ) AA ,(SELECT @rownum:=0)TMP ORDER BY COUNT DESC ) BB WHERE 1=1
AND COUNT LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND GM_DIVISION = #{item.searchKeyword}
AND GM_NAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND GM_DATE LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND PM_NAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND GM_USE = #{item.searchKeyword}
AND UI_NAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND GM_REGDT LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND ( COUNT LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR GM_DIVISION = #{item.searchKeyword} OR GM_NAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR GM_DATE LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR PM_NAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR GM_USE = #{item.searchKeyword} OR UI_NAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR GM_REGDT LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') )
mapper.select:
SELECT @rownum:=@rownum+1 as COUNT ,AA.* FROM( SELECT LEFT(A.GM_REGDT, 10) GM_REGDT_TEMP , CASE WHEN A.GM_DIVISION = 'C' THEN '일반' WHEN A.GM_DIVISION = 'S' THEN '특별' END AS GM_DIVISION_TEMP ,CASE WHEN A.GM_USE = 'N' THEN '사용안함' WHEN A.GM_USE = 'Y' THEN '사용함' END AS GM_USE_TEMP , A.* FROM ( SELECT GM.* , U.UI_NAME , MIN(GSM.GSM_STDT) GSM_STDT , MAX(GSM.GSM_ENDT) GSM_ENDT , P.PM_NAME FROM t_group_manager GM
LEFT JOIN u_userinfo U ON U.UI_KEYNO = GM.GM_REGNM
LEFT JOIN t_group_schedule_main GSM ON GM.GM_KEYNO = GSM.GSM_GM_KEYNO
LEFT JOIN t_place_manager P ON P.PM_KEYNO = GM.GM_PLACE
LEFT JOIN s_common_file_sub FS ON P.PM_FS_KEYNO = FS.FS_KEYNO
WHERE PM_USE = 'Y' AND GM_DELYN = 'N' AND GM_USE != 'D' AND GM_KEYNO = #{GM_KEYNO} GROUP BY GM.GM_KEYNO ORDER BY GM.GM_REGDT ) A ) AA ,(SELECT @rownum:=0)TMP ORDER BY COUNT DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_group_schedule_sub WHERE GSS_GSM_KEYNO IN ( SELECT GSM_KEYNO FROM t_group_schedule_main WHERE GSM_GM_KEYNO = #{GM_KEYNO} )
mapper.select:
SELECT @rownum:=@rownum+1 as COUNT , A.* FROM( SELECT CASE WHEN GM.GM_USE = 'N' THEN '사용안함' WHEN GM.GM_USE = 'Y' THEN '사용함' END AS GM_USE_TEMP , CASE WHEN GM_DIVISION = 'C' THEN '일반' WHEN GM_DIVISION = 'S' THEN '특별' END AS GM_DIVISION_TEMP , LEFT(GM.GM_REGDT, 10) GM_REGDT_TEMP , GM.* , U.UI_NAME , MIN(GSM.GSM_STDT) GSM_STDT , MAX(GSM.GSM_ENDT) GSM_ENDT , P.PM_NAME FROM t_group_manager GM LEFT JOIN u_userinfo U ON U.UI_KEYNO = GM.GM_REGNM LEFT JOIN t_group_schedule_main GSM ON GM.GM_KEYNO = GSM.GSM_GM_KEYNO LEFT JOIN t_place_manager P ON P.PM_KEYNO = GM.GM_PLACE LEFT JOIN s_common_file_sub FS ON P.PM_FS_KEYNO = FS.FS_KEYNO
WHERE PM_USE = 'Y' AND GM_DELYN = 'N' AND GM_USE = 'Y'
AND GM_KEYNO = #{GM_KEYNO}
GROUP BY GM_KEYNO HAVING GM_MN_HOMEDIV_C = (SELECT HM_MN_HOMEDIV_C FROM s_home_manager WHERE HM_TILES = #{apTiles} AND HM_USE_YN='Y') ORDER BY GM_REGDT ) A ,(SELECT @rownum:=0)TMP ORDER BY COUNT DESC

SELECT * FROM t_group_participate
WHERE GP_GM_KEYNO = #{GM_KEYNO} AND GP_DELYN = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_group_participate WHERE GP_GM_KEYNO = #{GM_KEYNO} AND GP_DELYN = 'N'
mapper.sql:
FROM ( SELECT * FROM( SELECT @rownum:=@rownum+1 as COUNT, A.* FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(GP.GP_DATE,' / ', GP.GP_TIME) SEQ , GP_KEYNO , GP.GP_GROUPNAME , GM.GM_NAME , GM_KEYNO , LEFT(GP.GP_REGDT,19) GP_REGDT , U.UI_NAME FROM t_group_participate GP
LEFT JOIN t_group_manager GM ON GM.GM_KEYNO = GP.GP_GM_KEYNO
LEFT JOIN u_userinfo U ON GP.GP_UI_KEYNO = U.UI_KEYNO
WHERE GP_DELYN = 'N'
AND GM_MN_HOMEDIV_C = #{GM_MN_HOMEDIV_C}
ORDER BY GP_DATE , GP_TIME ) A WHERE (@ROWNUM:=0)=0 ) AA ORDER BY AA.COUNT DESC ) BB WHERE 1=1
AND COUNT LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND UI_NAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND GM_NAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND SEQ LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND GP_GROUPNAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND GP_REGDT LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND ( COUNT LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR UI_NAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR GM_NAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR SEQ LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR GP_GROUPNAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR GP_REGDT LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') )
